headlines.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.6 Released with 1M Context
headlines.summary: New flagship models with 1M context windows, adaptive thinking, and enhanced performance
headlines.relevance_for_devs: Major upgrade with 1M context and improved API capabilities

headlines.title: Message Batches API Raised to 300k Output Tokens
headlines.summary: Batch API now supports up to 300k output tokens for Opus/Sonnet 4.6
headlines.relevance_for_devs: Enables much longer single-turn outputs in batch processing

headlines.title: Automatic Caching for Messages API
headlines.summary: Single cache_control field enables automatic cache management without manual breakpoints

headlines.title: Data Residency Controls with inference_geo Parameter
headlines.summary: Choose US-only inference routing at 1.1x pricing for newer models
headlines.relevance_for_devs: Compliance-focused API parameter for geographic data handling

headlines.title: Claude Code 2.2.0+ Adds Skills and Channel Features
headlines.summary: Agent Skills beta, channel-based permissions, and improved stability fixes
headlines.relevance_for_devs: New extensibility features for development workflows

headlines.title: Anthropic Economic Index Shows AI Labor Impact
headlines.summary: Research reveals AI usage patterns and limited employment effects to date
headlines.relevance_for_devs: Insights into real-world AI adoption patterns

headlines.title: Emotion Concepts Research in Large Language Models
headlines.summary: Latest interpretability research explores how Claude processes emotional concepts internally
headlines.relevance_for_devs: Understanding model internal representations for better prompting

headlines.title: Structured Outputs Moved to output_config.format
headlines.summary: API parameter migration from output_format to new output_config structure
headlines.relevance_for_devs: Breaking change requiring code updates for structured outputs

headlines.title: Fast Mode for Opus 4.6 at Premium Pricing
headlines.summary: 2.5x faster inference for Opus at $30/$150 per million tokens
headlines.relevance_for_devs: Speed optimization option for time-sensitive applications

headlines.title: Models API Returns Capability Fields
headlines.summary: GET /v1/models now includes max_input_tokens, max_tokens, and capabilities object
headlines.relevance_for_devs: Programmatic access to model specifications and limits
